title: Zombie Apocalypse Drops
description: This Mod adds additional drops to Zombies.
body:
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1029186?logo=curseforge&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=orange&color=242424)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-apocalypse-drops) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/zombie-apocalypse-drops?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=black&label=&labelColor=18ED49&color=242424)](https://modrinth.com/mod/zombie-apocalypse-drops) [![Supported Versions](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/versions/1029186(4F21AC).svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zombie-apocalypse-drops) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1388544059114786907?style=flat&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=&labelColor=blue)](https://discord.gg/rSVp3nCpPx) [![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-75D5E3?logo=ko-fi)](https://ko-fi.com/D1D71EVQVC)

With this mod additional Zombie drops can be added. This mod is useful in Zombie Apocalypse scenarios, especially when Nether and End are disabled.

The following items can be added to Zombie drops:
- Gunpowder
- Bone
- String
- Spider eye
- Phantom membrane
- Ender pearls
- Carrots (is a standard Zombie drop, only the drop chance can be changed with this mod)
- Potatos (is a standard Zombie drop, only the drop chance can be changed with this mod)
- Blaze rod (turned off in the default config)
- Nether wart (turned off in the default config)

Notes: 
- the drops can also be enabled for Husks
- other standard Zombie drops (like Rotten Flesh) are not affected by this mod
- to disable a certain drop, set the chance to 0.0 in the config


Config Options:
